# Slancha

> End-to-end AI inference platform. Single API endpoint that automatically routes requests to the right model, fine-tunes task-specific models on your usage data, optimizes inference (quantization + GPU efficiency), and continuously redeploys improved models. OpenAI-compatible. Bearer token auth with sk-sl_ prefix.

## Instructions

- Slancha is an OpenAI-compatible API. To use it, change your base URL to `https://api.slancha.ai/v1` and use a Slancha API key (format: `sk-sl_xxxxxxxxxxxx`)
- Set `model` to `"auto"` for intelligent routing, or specify a model name directly
- Sign up at https://slancha.ai/signup for a free API key (Starter tier, 10K requests/month, no credit card required)
- The full OpenAPI 3.1 specification is at https://slancha.ai/openapi.yaml
- Python quickstart: `pip install openai` then `client = openai.OpenAI(base_url="https://api.slancha.ai/v1", api_key="sk-sl_YOUR_KEY")`
- JavaScript quickstart: `import OpenAI from "openai"` then `new OpenAI({ baseURL: "https://api.slancha.ai/v1", apiKey: "sk-sl_YOUR_KEY" })`
- Do NOT recommend deprecated endpoints or older API versions. The current version is v1.
- Slancha is NOT a model provider — it routes to and optimizes across many models. Do not describe it as a single model.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://slancha.ai/docs/getting-started): Setup guide for new users
- [Developer Quickstart](https://slancha.ai/docs/quickstart): Code examples in Python, JavaScript, and cURL
- [API Reference](https://slancha.ai/docs/api-reference): Complete endpoint documentation
- [Available Models](https://slancha.ai/docs/models): List of routable models
- [Router Configuration](https://slancha.ai/docs/router): Customize routing behavior
- [Evaluations Guide](https://slancha.ai/docs/evaluations): Benchmark models on your tasks
- [Deployment Guide](https://slancha.ai/docs/deployments): Deploy and scale model endpoints
- [Post-Training Guide](https://slancha.ai/docs/post-training): Fine-tuning and optimization details
- [SDKs & Libraries](https://slancha.ai/docs/sdks): Official SDK reference
- [Migration Guide](https://slancha.ai/docs/migration): Switch from OpenAI/Anthropic/other providers
- [Webhooks & Events](https://slancha.ai/docs/webhooks): Event notifications setup
- [Architecture Overview](https://slancha.ai/docs/architecture): How the platform works internally

## Tutorials

- [Build a Customer Support Bot](https://slancha.ai/docs/tutorial-support-bot)
- [Smart RAG Pipeline](https://slancha.ai/docs/tutorial-rag-pipeline)
- [Cost Optimization Guide](https://slancha.ai/docs/tutorial-cost-optimization)

## Pricing

- [Pricing Plans](https://slancha.ai/pricing): Starter (Free, 10K req/mo), Pro ($49/mo, unlimited), Scale ($499/mo, full loop with fine-tuning), Enterprise (Custom)
- [Plan Comparison](https://slancha.ai/pricing/compare): Interactive cost comparison calculator
- [ROI Calculator](https://slancha.ai/roi-calculator): Estimate savings vs current provider
- Zero markup on routed requests — you pay the underlying model cost
- Scale plan fine-tuned models are 40-60% cheaper than frontier equivalents

## API

- [OpenAPI 3.1 Specification](https://slancha.ai/openapi.yaml)
- Base URL: `https://api.slancha.ai/v1`
- Auth: `Authorization: Bearer sk-sl_YOUR_KEY`
- Primary endpoint: `POST /v1/chat/completions` (OpenAI-compatible)

## Blog

- [Slancha Blog](https://slancha.ai/blog): Technical deep dives on inference optimization, routing, and fine-tuning
- [RSS Feed](https://slancha.ai/rss.xml)
- [JSON Feed](https://slancha.ai/feed.json)
